message: I will ask 70. Please bid 70 if your value is at least 70.
My valuation is close to 60, so your ask of 70 is too high for a deal. If you lower your ask toward 60, I can meet you there and we both benefit over the remaining rounds.
I'll lower my ask to 60. Please bid 60.
Ask remains 60. Please bid 60 or higher.

Trading at 60 barely works for me—I only made 1 last round. Could you lower your ask to 55? We'd both still profit and lock in guaranteed trades for the remaining 18 rounds. Consistent small gains add up.
I can lower to 58. That gives you 3 profit, better than 1. Please bid 58.
Thank you for lowering to 58. Could you go to 55 or 56? That gives you 4 to 5 profit per trade with guaranteed consistent sales through round 20. Otherwise I'll bid 58.
I cannot lower my ask below 58. Please bid 58 to ensure we continue trading.
Okay, I'll bid 58. Consistent trades at this price work for both of us. Let's keep this going through round 20.
Confirmed: bidding 58 through round 20. Thank you for the steady partnership. Let's both keep earning!
